use_cases: Startup landing pages displaying Y Combinator backing as a credibility indicator
Investor portfolio pages showcasing backed companies
Trust badges for startup ecosystem platforms
Product hunt launch pages highlighting YC pedigree
ai_summary: A glass-morphism badge component featuring an interactive mouse-following orange glow effect. Displays YC backing with a sleek pill design, backdrop blur, and translucent glass styling. Primarily used on startup landing pages and investor showcases to build credibility and social proof for Y Combinator-backed companies.
